name: stl
desc: Support for doing something awesome.

name: Any
desc: A type-safe container for single values of literally any type.

name: Any.empty
desc: Creates an empty container holding exactly no memory state natively.

name: Any.new
desc: Encapsulates a tangible value strictly inside the container.

name: cast
desc:
Safely extracts the wrapped pointer back to its real object securely validating type T.
Extremely robust and strictly type-safe natively.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the internal state is exactly empty natively.

name: get
desc: Retrieves the wrapped object as dynamic. Throws natively if empty.

name: hasValue
desc: Determines whether the internal box state currently holds an active value natively.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator %
desc: Dynamically modulates exactly natively.

name: operator *
desc: Dynamically multiplies exactly natively.

name: operator +
desc: Dynamically adds exactly natively.

name: operator -
desc: Dynamically subtracts exactly natively.

name: operator /
desc: Dynamically divides exactly natively.

name: operator <
desc: Dynamically resolves logically accurate less-than natively.

name: operator <=
desc: Dynamically resolves less-than-or-equal stably natively.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: operator >
desc: Dynamically resolves logically accurate greater-than natively.

name: operator >=
desc: Dynamically resolves greater-than-or-equal stably natively.

name: operator []
desc: Dynamically reads an element internally via bracket notation.

name: operator []=
desc: Dynamically writes an element internally via bracket notation.

name: reset
desc: Destroys the active internal state natively, wiping the object entirely.

name: set
desc: Swaps its internal pointer gracefully with another value dynamically.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: type
desc:
Fetches exactly the strict runtime type of the dynamically wrapped inner memory state.
Throws natively if empty.

name: Array
desc: A conceptually strict fixed-size contiguous sequence.

name: Array.from
desc: Constructs an array from existing collections efficiently blocking bounds dynamically.

name: Array.generate
desc: Natively constructs an array matching sizes explicitly utilizing dynamic generator mapping structurally.

name: Array.new
desc: Natively constructs an array explicitly sized mapping exactly to std::array.

name: add
desc:
Adds value to the end of this list,
extending the length by one.

name: addAll
desc: Appends all objects of iterable to the end of this list.

name: at
desc: Safely attempts to extract explicitly passing array structurally bounds safely without panicking.

name: back
desc: Natively fetches exactly the structural back mapping recursively.

name: clear
desc: Removes all objects from this list; the length of the list becomes zero.

name: fill
desc: Sets exactly all structural elements dynamically internally bounds effectively maps perfectly.

name: front
desc: Natively fetches exactly the first structural object bound explicitly.

name: insert
desc: Inserts element at position index in this list.

name: insertAll
desc: Inserts all objects of iterable at position index in this list.

name: length
desc: The number of objects in this list.

name: operator +
desc: Evaluates arithmetic array dynamically mapped returning effectively native Lists correctly unbound natively!

name: operator []
desc: The object at the given index in the list.

name: operator []=
desc: Sets the value at the given index in the list to value.

name: remove
desc: Removes the first occurrence of value from this list.

name: removeAt
desc: Removes the object at position index from this list.

name: removeLast
desc: Removes and returns the last object in this list.

name: size
desc: Natively size mapping explicitly bound structurally natively.

name: BitSet
desc:
A space-efficient set implementation for managing boolean flags.
Mimics C++ std::bitset functionality.

name: BitSet.new
desc: Creates a BitSet with a fixed number of bits.

name: all
desc: Checks if all bits are set to true.

name: any
desc: Checks if any bit is set to true.

name: count
desc: Counts the total number of bits set to true.

name: flip
desc: Flips the bit at index. If no index is provided, flips all bits.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: none
desc: Checks if no bits are set (all false).

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: operator []
desc: Convenience operator for checking a bit.

name: operator []=
desc: Convenience operator for setting a bit.

name: reset
desc: Sets the bit at index to false.

name: set
desc: Sets the bit at index to true (or the provided value).

name: size
desc: The number of bits this BitSet holds.

name: test
desc: Returns true if the bit at index is set.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Box
desc: A mutable wrapper designed to hold and update values.

name: Box.new
desc: Creates a Box encapsulating the provided value.

name: call
desc: Unboxes the value implicitly when called functionally.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator %
desc: Modulo operator.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplies a value or another box algebraically.

name: operator +
desc: Adds a value or another box algebraically.

name: operator -
desc: Subtracts a value or another box algebraically.

name: operator /
desc: Divides a value or another box algebraically.

name: operator <
desc: Less than comparison.

name: operator <=
desc: Less than or equal comparison.

name: operator ==
desc: Standard equivalence checking.

name: operator >
desc: Greater than comparison.

name: operator >=
desc: Greater than or equal comparison.

name: operator ~/
desc: Integer Division operator.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: value
desc: The underlying value held inside the box.

name: CartesianRange
desc:
A view that generates the Cartesian product of two iterables.
Mimics C++ std::views::cartesian_product.

name: CartesianRange.new
desc: Creates a CartesianRange combining the elements of the first and second iterable.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: ChunkRange
desc:
A view that splits an iterable into chunks of a specific size.
Mimics C++ std::views::chunk.
The last chunk may be smaller than the requested size if the total number
of elements is not perfectly divisible by the chunk size.

name: ChunkRange.new
desc: Creates a ChunkRange that splits the given iterable into chunks of a specific size.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: ComparablePair
desc:
Adds C++ <utility> relational operators securely without sacrificing generic safety.
These operators (<, <=, >, >=, compareTo) automatically unlock
when both T1 and T2 happen to extend Comparable.

name: compareTo
desc: Compares this pair lexicographically with other.

name: operator <
desc: Returns whether this pair is lexicographically less than other.

name: operator <=
desc: Returns whether this pair is lexicographically less than or equal to other.

name: operator >
desc: Returns whether this pair is lexicographically greater than other.

name: operator >=
desc: Returns whether this pair is lexicographically greater than or equal to other.

name: Deque
desc:
A double-ended queue (deque) that allows for insertion and deletion of elements
at both the front and the rear.

name: Deque.from
desc: Creates a deque containing the elements of the given iterable.

name: Deque.new
desc: Creates an empty deque.

name: at
desc:
Random access: retrieves the element at index.
Note: O(N) complexity due to underlying ListQueue implementation.

name: back
desc: Returns the back element without removing it (C++ STL naming).

name: clear
desc: Removes all elements from the deque.

name: deleteFront
desc:
Removes and returns the element at the front of the deque.
Throws a StateError if the deque is empty.

name: deleteLast
desc:
Removes and returns the element at the last (rear) of the deque.
Throws a StateError if the deque is empty.

name: front
desc: Returns the front element without removing it (C++ STL naming).

name: getFront
desc:
Returns the element at the front of the deque without removing it.
Throws a StateError if the deque is empty.

name: getRear
desc:
Returns the element at the rear (last) of the deque without removing it.
Throws a StateError if the deque is empty.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: insertFront
desc: Inserts an element at the front of the deque.

name: insertLast
desc: Inserts an element at the last (rear) of the deque.

name: isEmpty
desc: Returns true if the deque is empty.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Returns true if the deque has at least one element.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: length
desc: Returns the number of elements in the deque.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: operator []
desc: Operator overload for random access.

name: operator []=
desc:
Operator overload for setting an element at index.
Note: O(N) complexity as it requires rebuilding parts of the queue.

name: popBack
desc: Removes and returns the back element (C++ STL naming).

name: popFront
desc: Removes and returns the front element (C++ STL naming).

name: pushBack
desc: Adds an element to the back (C++ STL naming).

name: pushFront
desc: Adds an element to the front (C++ STL naming).

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this deque with those of other.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: DropRange
desc:
A view that drops the first count elements of an iterable.
Mimics C++ std::views::drop.

name: DropRange.new
desc: Creates a DropRange that skips the first _count elements of _iterable.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: FilterRange
desc:
A view that filters elements based on a predicate.
Mimics C++ std::views::filter.

name: FilterRange.new
desc: Creates a FilterRange that conditionally yields elements of _iterable matching _predicate.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: ForwardList
desc: A singly-linked list.

name: ForwardList.from
desc:
Creates a forward list from an iterable.
Elements are added in the order they appear, so the first element
of the iterable will be at the front of the forward list.

name: ForwardList.new
desc: Creates an empty forward list.

name: clear
desc: Clears the list.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the list is empty.

name: eraseAfter
desc: Removes the element immediately following the given index.

name: front
desc:
Retrieves the first element of the list.
Throws a StateError if the list is empty.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: insertAfter
desc: Inserts a new element directly after the specified logical index.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: length
desc: The number of elements in this Iterable.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: popFront
desc:
Removes the first element from the list.
Throws a StateError if the list is empty.

name: pushFront
desc: Adds an element to the front of the list.

name: remove
desc: Removes all elements equal to value.

name: removeIf
desc: Removes all elements for which test returns true.

name: reverse
desc:
Reverses the list in place (O(N) time complexity).
This is highly efficient as it just redirects the underlying node pointers.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this list with those of other.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: unique
desc: Removes consecutive duplicate elements.

name: HashSet
desc: An unordered collection that contains no duplicate elements.

name: HashSet.from
desc: Creates a HashSet containing the elements of the given iterable.

name: HashSet.new
desc: Creates an empty HashSet.

name: clear
desc: Removes all elements from the set.

name: contains
desc: Returns true if the set contains the exact element.

name: containsAll
desc: Whether this set contains all the elements of other.

name: difference
desc: Returns a new set with the elements of this that are not in other.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the set is empty.

name: erase
desc: Removes element from the set (C++ STL style).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: insert
desc: Inserts a new element into the set.

name: intersection
desc: Returns a new set which is the intersection between this set and other.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Returns true if the set is not empty.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: size
desc: Returns the number of elements in the set.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this set with those of other.

name: union
desc: Returns a new set which contains all the elements of this set and other.

name: I8
desc: An 8-bit signed integer primitive.

name: addChecked
desc: Adds another I8 to this, throwing a StateError on overflow or underflow.

name: max
desc: The maximum value an I8 can hold (127).

name: min
desc: The minimum value an I8 can hold (-128).

name: mulChecked
desc: Multiplies this by another I8, throwing a StateError on overflow or underflow.

name: operator %
desc: Modulo operator, wrapping around to remain within I8.

name: operator &
desc: Performs bitwise AND.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplies this by another I8, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: operator +
desc: Adds another I8 to this, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: operator -
desc: Subtracts another I8 from this, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: operator <<
desc: Left shifts by shiftAmount bits.

name: operator >>
desc: Right shifts by shiftAmount bits.

name: operator >>>
desc: Unsigned right shift.

name: operator ^
desc: Performs bitwise XOR.

name: operator unary-
desc: Returns the negated value.

name: operator |
desc: Performs bitwise OR.

name: operator ~
desc: Performs bitwise NOT.

name: operator ~/
desc: Divides this by another I8, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: subChecked
desc: Subtracts another I8 from this, throwing a StateError on overflow or underflow.

name: I16
desc: A 16-bit signed integer primitive.

name: addChecked
desc: Adds another I16 to this, throwing a StateError on overflow or underflow.

name: max
desc: The maximum value an I16 can hold (32767).

name: min
desc: The minimum value an I16 can hold (-32768).

name: mulChecked
desc: Multiplies this by another I16, throwing a StateError on overflow or underflow.

name: operator %
desc: Modulo operator, wrapping around to remain within I16.

name: operator &
desc: Performs bitwise AND.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplies this by another I16, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: operator +
desc: Adds another I16 to this, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: operator -
desc: Subtracts another I16 from this, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: operator <<
desc: Left shifts by shiftAmount bits.

name: operator >>

name: operator >>>
desc: Unsigned right shift.

desc: Performs bitwise XOR.

name: operator unary-
desc: Returns the negated value.

name: operator |
desc: Performs bitwise OR.

name: operator ~
desc: Performs bitwise NOT.

name: operator ~/
desc: Divides this by another I16, wrapping around on overflow/underflow.

name: subChecked
desc: Subtracts another I16 from this, throwing a StateError on overflow or underflow.

name: I32
desc: A 32-bit signed integer primitive.

name: operator %
desc: Euclidean modulo of this number by other.

name: operator &
desc: Bit-wise and operator.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplies this number by other.

name: operator +
desc: Adds other to this number.

name: operator -
desc: Subtracts other from this number.

name: operator <<
desc: Shift the bits of this integer to the left by shiftAmount.

name: operator >>
desc: Shift the bits of this integer to the right by shiftAmount.

name: operator >>>
desc: Bitwise unsigned right shift by shiftAmount bits.

name: operator ^
desc: Bit-wise exclusive-or operator.

name: operator unary-
desc: Subtracts other from this number.

name: operator |
desc: Bit-wise or operator.

name: operator ~
desc: The bit-wise negate operator.

name: operator ~/
desc: Truncating division operator.

name: I64
desc: A 64-bit signed integer primitive.

name: operator %
desc: Euclidean modulo of this number by other.

name: operator &
desc: Bit-wise and operator.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplies this number by other.

name: operator +
desc: Adds other to this number.

name: operator -
desc: Subtracts other from this number.

name: operator <<
desc: Shift the bits of this integer to the left by shiftAmount.

name: operator >>
desc: Shift the bits of this integer to the right by shiftAmount.

name: operator >>>
desc: Bitwise unsigned right shift by shiftAmount bits.

name: operator ^

name: operator unary-
desc: Subtracts other from this number.

name: operator |

name: operator ~

desc: Truncating division operator.

name: Int8
desc: A robust, heap-allocated 8-bit signed integer wrapper utilizing dart:typed_data.

name: Int8.from
desc: Dynamically instantiates a Int8 value mapped sequentially into memory.

name: addChecked
desc: Adds other dynamically intercepting any numerical layout overflow triggering a Dart StateError.

name: max
desc: Returns the statically-bounded maximum value of a 8-bit signed integer (127).

name: min
desc: Returns the statically-bounded minimum value of a 8-bit signed integer (-128).

name: mulChecked
desc: Evaluates exact strict mathematical bounding conditions without truncating natively.

name: operator %
desc: Modulo remainder constraint matching natively bounded data models.

name: operator &
desc: Bitwise AND logically coupled to bit patterns.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplication mathematically clipped naturally to standard hardware constraints.

name: operator +
desc: Standard addition. Natively handles and wraps exact numerical overflows gracefully.

name: operator -
desc: Standard subtraction. Computes precise arithmetic underflows independently.

name: operator <
desc: Returns true if this value evaluates less than other.

name: operator <<
desc: Left-shifts the integer's bits gracefully overflowing when passing the bit barrier.

name: operator <=
desc: Returns true if this bounds-checked value is less than or equal to other.

name: operator >
desc: Strict evaluation if this numerical element is larger.

name: operator >=
desc: Strict evaluation extending identical size bounds.

name: operator >>
desc: Right-shifts the numerical data maintaining standard sign retention.

name: operator ^
desc: Bitwise XOR operator.

name: operator |
desc: Bitwise OR operator.

name: operator ~
desc: Bitwise NOT standardly shifting limits.

name: operator ~/
desc: Truncating division.

name: subChecked
desc: Subtracts other throwing a programmatic bounds break upon underflow.

name: value
desc: Extracts the underlying raw Dart int strictly clamped.

name: JoinRange
desc:
A view that flattens an iterable of iterables into a single contiguous iterable.
Mimics C++ std::views::join.

name: JoinRange.new
desc: Creates a JoinRange flattening the _iterable of iterables.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: None
desc: Variant representing a missing value.

name: None.new
desc: Creates a constant None variant representing the absence of a value.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: NumberLine
desc:
A memory-efficient iterable sequence of numbers.
Mimics C++ std::views::iota or Python's range().

name: NumberLine.new
desc: Creates a memory-efficient sequence from start to end exclusive, incrementing by step.

name: contains
desc: Whether the collection contains an element equal to element.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the sequence is empty.

name: end
desc: The ending exclusive boundary of the sequence.

name: get
desc: Retrieves the element at the specified 0-based index in O(1) time.

name: hasValue
desc: Returns true if the sequence has elements.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: length
desc: The number of elements in this Iterable.

name: operator %
desc: Modulo operation on sequence boundaries keeping the step intact.

name: operator *
desc: Scales the sequence proportionally by multiplying boundaries and step by factor.

name: operator +
desc: Shifts the sequence by adding offset consistently to boundaries.

name: operator -
desc: Shifts the sequence by subtracting offset consistently from boundaries.

name: operator /
desc: Divides the sequence proportionally safely returning a NumberLine of doubles.

name: operator <
desc: Safely performs lexicographical comparison against another iterable.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: operator []
desc: Retrieves the element at the specified 0-based index in O(1) time.

name: operator []=
desc: Unsupported. Modifying a generated mathematical sequence element by element is invalid.

name: reset
desc: Resets the sequence to its initial state.

name: set
desc: Modifies the boundaries of this number line sequence.

name: start
desc: The starting inclusive boundary of the sequence.

name: step
desc: The amount or distance to step incrementally on each iteration.

name: toString
desc: Returns a string representation of (some of) the elements of this.

name: type
desc: Returns the type argument T.

name: Optional
desc:
A container for a value that may or may not exist.
Using a sealed class ensures exhaustive pattern matching.

name: Optional.none
desc: Creates an empty Optional.

name: Optional.of
desc: Creates an Optional containing value.

name: Optional.ofNullable
desc: Wraps a nullable value. Returns None if value is null.

name: flatMap
desc:
Transforms the value using a function that returns an Optional.
Prevents nested structures like Optional<Optional<T>>.

name: isEmpty
desc: Returns true if this is a None instance.

name: isPresent
desc: Returns true if this is a Some instance.

name: map
desc: Transforms the value if present using mapper.

name: valueOr
desc: Returns the value if present, otherwise returns fallback.

name: Pair
desc: A class that stores a pair of values.

name: Pair.fromMapEntry
desc: Creates a Pair from a MapEntry.

name: Pair.fromRecord
desc: Creates a Pair from a modern Dart 3 Record.

name: Pair.new
desc: Creates a Pair grouping the first and second values dynamically.

name: clone
desc: Creates a shallow clone of the Pair.

name: first
desc: The first element of the pair.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: record
desc:
Returns the pair as a modern Dart 3 Record for easy destructuring.
Example: var (a, b) = myPair.record;

name: second
desc: The second element of the pair.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this pair with those of other.

name: toList
desc: Returns the elements as a standard Dart List.

name: toMapEntry
desc: Returns the pair as a MapEntry, making it perfectly compatible with Dart Maps.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: PriorityQueue
desc: An adapter class that provides a Priority Queue (Heap) data structure.

name: PriorityQueue.from
desc: Creates a PriorityQueue containing the elements of the given iterable.

name: PriorityQueue.new
desc: Creates an empty PriorityQueue.

name: clear
desc: Clears the priority queue.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the priority queue is empty.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Returns true if the priority queue is not empty.

name: length
desc: Alias for generic Dart collection length.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: pop
desc:
Removes and returns the top priority element from the queue. Time complexity: O(log N).
Throws a StateError if the queue is empty.

name: push
desc: Pushes an element into the priority queue. Time complexity: O(log N).

name: size
desc: Returns the number of elements in the priority queue.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this priority queue with those of other.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: top
desc:
Returns the top priority element without removing it. Time complexity: O(1).
Throws a StateError if the queue is empty.

name: Queue
desc: An adapter class that provides a First-In, First-Out (FIFO) data structure.

name: Queue.from
desc:
Creates a queue containing the elements of the given iterable.
Elements are pushed in the order they appear, so the first element
of the iterable will be at the front of the queue.

name: Queue.new
desc: Creates an empty queue using a Deque as the default underlying container.

name: back
desc:
Returns the back element of the queue without removing it.
Throws a StateError if the queue is empty.

name: clear
desc: Clears the queue.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the queue is empty.

name: front
desc:
Returns the front element of the queue without removing it.
Throws a StateError if the queue is empty.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Returns true if the queue has at least one element.

name: iterator
desc: Returns an iterator that iterates from the front of the queue to the back (FIFO order).

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: pop
desc:
Removes and returns the front element from the queue.
Throws a StateError if the queue is empty.

name: push
desc: Pushes an element onto the back of the queue.

name: size
desc: Returns the number of elements in the queue.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this queue with those of other.

name: Ref
desc: A mutable reference wrapper for binding and managing a value.

name: Ref.new
desc: Creates a new reference bound to the provided value.

name: call
desc: Evaluates and retrieves the bound value implicitly.

name: get
desc: Retrieves the currently bound value.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: rebind
desc: Rebinds this reference to point to the exact same value as other.

name: set
desc: Rebinds the reference to a completely new value.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: RepeatRange
desc:
A view that repeats a single value either limits-free (infinitely) or a specific amount of times.
Mimics C++ std::views::repeat.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: Set
desc: A collection that contains no duplicate elements.

name: Set.from
desc: Creates a Set containing the elements of the given iterable.

name: Set.new
desc: Creates an empty Set.

name: clear
desc: Removes all elements from the set.

name: contains
desc: Returns true if the set contains the exact element.

name: containsAll
desc: Whether this set contains all the elements of other.

name: difference
desc: Returns a new set with the elements of this that are not in other.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the set is empty.

name: erase
desc: Removes element from the set (C++ STL style).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: insert
desc: Inserts a new element into the set.

name: intersection
desc: Returns a new set which is the intersection between this set and other.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Returns true if the set is not empty.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: size
desc: Returns the number of elements in the set.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this set with those of other.

name: union
desc: Returns a new set which contains all the elements of this set and other.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==

name: clear
desc: Removes all elements from the set.

desc: Returns true if the set contains the exact element. Time complexity: O(log N).

name: containsAll
desc: Whether this set contains all the elements of other.

name: difference
desc: Returns a new SortedSet with the elements of this that are not in other.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the set is empty.

desc: Removes element from the set. Time complexity: O(log N).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

desc: Inserts a new element into the set. Time complexity: O(log N).

name: Stack
desc: An adapter class that provides a Last-In, First-Out (LIFO) data structure.

name: Stack.from
desc:
Creates a stack containing the elements of the given iterable.
Elements are pushed in the order they appear, so the last element
of the iterable will be at the top of the stack.

name: Stack.new
desc: Creates an empty stack using a Deque as the default underlying container.

name: clear
desc: Clears the stack.

name: empty
desc: Returns true if the stack is empty.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Returns true if the stack has at least one element.

name: iterator
desc: Returns an iterator that iterates from the top of the stack to the bottom (LIFO order).

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: pop
desc:
Removes and returns the top element from the stack.
Throws a StateError if the stack is empty.

name: push
desc: Pushes an element onto the top of the stack.

name: size
desc: Returns the number of elements in the stack.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this stack with those of other.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: top
desc:
Returns the top element of the stack without removing it.
Throws a StateError if the stack is empty.

name: TakeRange
desc:
A view that yields up to the first count elements of an iterable.
Mimics C++ std::views::take.

name: TakeRange.new
desc: Creates a TakeRange that limits iteration to the first _count elements of _iterable.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: TransformRange
desc:
A view that transforms elements from one type to another using a mapping function.
Mimics C++ std::views::transform.

name: TransformRange.new
desc: Creates a TransformRange lazily mapping _iterable via _transform.

desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: Uint8
desc: A robust, heap-allocated 8-bit unsigned integer wrapper utilizing dart:typed_data.

desc: Dynamically instantiates a Uint8 value mapped sequentially into memory.

desc: Adds other dynamically intercepting any numerical layout overflow triggering a Dart StateError.

name: min
desc: Returns the statically-bounded minimum value of a 8-bit unsigned integer (0).

name: mulChecked
desc: Evaluates exact strict mathematical bounding conditions without truncating natively.

name: operator %
desc: Modulo remainder constraint matching natively bounded data models.

name: operator &
desc: Bitwise AND logically coupled to bit patterns.

name: operator *
desc: Multiplication mathematically clipped naturally to standard hardware constraints.

name: operator +
desc: Standard addition. Natively handles and wraps exact numerical overflows gracefully.

name: operator -
desc: Standard subtraction. Computes precise arithmetic underflows independently.

name: operator <
desc: Returns true if this value evaluates less than other.

name: operator <<
desc: Left-shifts the integer's bits gracefully overflowing when passing the bit barrier.

name: operator >

name: operator >=
desc: Strict evaluation extending identical size bounds.

desc: Right-shifts the numerical data maintaining standard sign retention.

name: operator >>>
desc: Right-shift explicitly padding zeros unconditionally.

name: operator ~
desc: Bitwise NOT standardly shifting limits.

name: subChecked
desc: Subtracts other throwing a programmatic bounds break upon underflow.

name: Vector.new
desc: Creates a Vector containing the elements of the provided list.

name: assign
desc: Replaces the contents of the vector with count copies of value.

name: at
desc: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

name: back
desc: Retrieves the last element of the vector.

name: clear
desc: Removes all elements from the vector.

name: compareTo
desc: Lexicographically compares this vector to other.

name: contains
desc: Whether the collection contains an element equal to element.

name: front
desc: Retrieves the first element of the vector.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: insert
desc: Inserts value at the specified index.

name: insertAll
desc: Inserts a range of elements from iterable starting at index.

name: iterator
desc:
Exposes the iterator from the underlying list.
This allows the Vector to be used in standard Dart for (var x in vec) loops.

name: length
desc: Returns the number of elements in the vector (O(1) time).

name: operator *
desc:
You can overload the multiplication operator to take an int and return a new Vector repeated n times
(similar to Python's 1, 2 * 3 == 1, 2, 1, 2, 1, 2).

name: operator +
desc:
Concatenates two vectors.
Guarantees memory safety by creating a new vector with the combined elements.

name: operator -
desc: Removes all occurrences of elements found in other

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: operator []
desc: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

name: operator []=
desc: Sets the element at the specified index to value.

name: operator ~
desc: Converts the vector to a standard Dart list.

name: popBack
desc: Removes the last element from the vector.

name: pushBack
desc: Adds an element to the end of the vector.

name: resize
desc:
Resizes the vector to contain count elements.
If the current size is greater than count, the container is reduced to its first count elements.
If the current size is less than count, the container is expanded by inserting copies of fill.

name: swap
desc: Exchanges the contents of this vector with those of other.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: ZipRange
desc:
A view that iterates over two iterables in parallel, yielding Pairs.
Mimics C++ std::views::zip.
The iteration stops when the shortest iterable is exhausted.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: makePair
desc: A convenience function to create a Pair, mimicking C++ std::make_pair.
